reasoning: As of late 2025, Norovirus/Sapovirus vaccines (e.g., Moderna mRNA-1403, Vaxart, HilleVax) are still in clinical trials, with commercial approvals not anticipated before late 2026 or 2027 at the earliest. I assigned the minimum allowed probability (0.05) for the shortest horizon, slightly increasing to reflect increasing uncertainty over longer time horizons.
